sentences.arabic: أَكْمَلَتِ الْبِنْتُ الصَّوْمَ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ فِي حَيَاتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Djevojčica je po prvi put u životu završila post.
sentences.translationEn: The girl completed fasting for the first time in her life.

sentences.arabic: صَامَتْ مِنَ الصُّبْحِ حَتَّى الْمَغْرِبِ دُونَ شِكَايَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Postila je od sabaha do akšama bez prigovora.
sentences.translationEn: She fasted from dawn to sunset without complaint.

sentences.translation: Porodica se obradovala zbog nje i puno je hvalila.
sentences.translationEn: The family was happy for her and praised her a lot.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْجَدَّةُ: بَارَكَ اللَّهُ فِيكِ يَا حَبِيبَتِي.
sentences.translation: Baka je rekla: Allah ti podario bereket, dragana moja.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother said: May God bless you my dear.
